claim: LLM inference latency (500ms-5s for cloud APIs) is 100-5000x too slow for scalping execution
evidence_quote: YYM Yao and Zheng (2026) reviewed 30 LLM trading studies and found that none incorporated realistic execution timing assumptions

claim: Academic LLM trading results are systematically inflated by data leakage
evidence_quote: KTD-Fin benchmark showed LLM agents' cumulative returns are largely explained by passive market and style exposure

claim: Multi-agent architectures for trading lack live-market validation
evidence_quote: AgenticAITA's five-day dry run showed operational correctness but deferred statistically robust performance evaluation

claim: LLMs add value in non-time-critical meta-tasks for trading
evidence_quote: MadEvolve demonstrated significant improvements evolving feature sets for signal generation

claim: LLM+RL hybrid architectures fail under distribution shift
evidence_quote: During a macroeconomic shock, LLM-derived features add noise and the augmented agent under-performs a price-only baseline

claim: Commercial AI trading platforms lack independent performance audits
evidence_quote: Altrady analysis found 62% of AI trading bots are simple moving average crossovers with AI labels

claim: Chinese LLMs offer cost advantages but similar latency to Western models
evidence_quote: DeepSeek-V3 API pricing is ~15x cheaper than GPT-4o but latency remains comparable

claim: Crypto prediction markets are the most viable LLM trading niche
evidence_quote: PolySwarm swarm aggregation consistently outperforms single-model baselines in probability calibration

claim: Multi-agent coordination failures range between 41% and 87% in production
evidence_quote: Coordination as an Architectural Layer study found 41-87% failure rates from coordination defects

claim: Structured neuro-symbolic policy optimization outperforms unstructured prompt tweaking
evidence_quote: SHARP transformed generic initial heuristics into highly robust strategies, lifting performance by 10-20 percentage points

claim: The research-practice gap in LLM trading is widening
evidence_quote: The next useful step for LLM trading research is clearer reporting standards for execution realism and reproducibility

claim: TraderBench found 8/13 models have identical scores under adversarial conditions, exposing non-adaptive strategies
evidence_quote: Extended thinking helps retrieval (+26 points) but has zero impact on trading

claim: LLMs for alpha discovery via evolutionary optimization is the strongest use case
evidence_quote: LLM-GA framework achieved 215% better starting strategy quality than random initialization

claim: The centaur architecture (LLM for strategy, traditional systems for execution) is the proven pattern
evidence_quote: Yao and Zheng, SHARP, and MadEvolve all converge on layered latency separation architecture

claim: Augmented Startups investigation found AI trading bot success is mostly luck
evidence_quote: Performance disappeared when transaction costs and slippage were realistically modeled
